description: Wave 1 - M04 Zone State Engine: Implement occupancy state machine with all transitions, fail-safe logic, and vacancy confirmation. Branch: feat/m04-zone-state-engine. This is R3 safety-critical.
steps: Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/occupancy/state.go with OccupancyState enum and ZoneState struct

Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/occupancy/machine.go implementing the state machine with transitions: UNKNOWN->OCCUPIED, UNKNOWN->VACANT_PENDING, OCCUPIED->VACANT_PENDING, VACANT_PENDING->VACANT_CONFIRMED, VACANT_PENDING->OCCUPIED, ANY->STALE, STALE->OCCUPIED, STALE->VACANT_PENDING

Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/occupancy/config.go with configurable parameters: VacancyConfirmDuration(3s), VacancyConfirmSamples(3), StaleTimeout(10s), CameraOfflineTimeout(30s), DedupWindow(2s)
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/occupancy/machine_test.go with comprehensive truth table tests covering every valid transition

Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/occupancy/forbidden_test.go explicitly testing forbidden transitions: data timeout -> VACANT_CONFIRMED (must fail), camera offline -> VACANT_CONFIRMED (must fail), count parse failure -> VACANT_CONFIRMED (must fail)
Create services/gateway-server/internal/domain/occupancy/staleness.go implementing stale detection based on configurable timeout
Ensure default initial state is UNKNOWN for all zones
Ensure only VACANT_CONFIRMED satisfies vacancy condition - add explicit IsSafeVacant() method that returns true ONLY for VACANT_CONFIRMED
Document in code comments that this module is R3 and requires T1+T2 approval
Run make build and make test
acceptance_criteria: State machine implements all 5 states: OCCUPIED, VACANT_PENDING, VACANT_CONFIRMED, UNKNOWN, STALE
All valid transitions are tested with truth table
Forbidden transitions (to VACANT_CONFIRMED from invalid states) are explicitly tested and rejected
IsSafeVacant() returns true ONLY for VACANT_CONFIRMED
Camera offline produces UNKNOWN, never VACANT
make test succeeds with all state machine tests passing
